headline: nLIGHT Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: LASR heads into Q1 2026 with revenues seen up 38% Y/Y on strong defense demand, but exit from cutting and welding may pressure margins and growth.

headline: Polen Focus Growth Portfolio Q1 2026 Portfolio Update
summary: In Q1 2026, Polen Focus Growth Portfolio returned -17.27% (net of fees) compared to -9.78% for the Index. Read more here.
